name: hello-ebpf
onCreateCommand: sudo apt-get update && sudo apt-get install -y --no-install-recommends clang-19 libbpf-dev linux-tools-common linux-headers-$(uname -r) linux-tools-$(uname -r) gcc-multilib bpftool && ./mvnw -ntp -B package -DskipTests
_comment_sched_ext: Note: Codespaces host kernels (typically 6.x) may not expose sched_ext. XDP and tracepoints work and cover the README examples. sched_ext samples require a local Linux box or thinkstation workflow (see SYNC_WORKFLOW.md).
